plan: Step 1: Install dependencies — run `npm install` to ensure all tooling is available in the worktree
Step 2: Run `npm run lint` — verify ESLint passes on all src/ files; fix any errors found
Step 3: Run `npm run typecheck` — verify TypeScript compilation succeeds for both src/ and tests/; fix any type errors
Step 4: Run `npm run test` — verify all existing unit tests pass; fix any failing tests
Step 5: Run `npm run build` — execute the full build pipeline (policy:check + vite build) and confirm it exits 0 and produces dist/ with index.html and dist/assets/ with hashed JS+CSS bundles
Step 6: Run `npm run preview` — manually verify all 7 modules render and no console errors appear (manual step per ADR-035, Playwright deferred)

Step 7: Create `tests/us-035/production-build.test.ts` — following the pattern from tests/us-003/static-deploy.test.ts, assert: (a) npm run build exits 0, (b) dist/index.html exists, (c) dist/assets/ contains .js and .css files, (d) built index.html has no raw /src/ TypeScript references, (e) built index.html references hashed assets
Step 8: Run full verification sequence — lint, typecheck, test (including new US-035 tests), build all pass in sequence
Step 9: Mark ticket passes=true in Output/progress.md and commit all changes
testing_recommendations: Verify `npm run build` exits with code 0 (automated in test)
Assert dist/index.html exists after build (automated in test)
Assert dist/assets/ contains at least one .js and one .css bundle file (automated in test)
Assert built index.html contains no raw `/src/` TypeScript path references — ensures Vite replaced dev entry points (automated in test)
Assert built index.html references hashed asset filenames in dist/assets/ (automated in test)
Run `npm run preview` and manually verify all 7 dashboard modules render: intro, fingerprint, zero-click-osint, permission-debt, shadow-profile, threat-model, hardening (manual)
Verify no console errors appear during preview in browser DevTools (manual)
Confirm lint, typecheck, and all tests pass in sequence as final gate before marking complete
risks: Upstream lint/typecheck regressions from US-032/033/034 could block the build — mitigated by sequential pipeline catching errors early and all upstream tickets already passing their deployment gates
html2canvas is listed as devDependency but imported at runtime — Vite bundles all imports regardless of dependency classification, so this is a non-issue per ADR-018/035
vite preview requires manual browser verification for console errors and module rendering — cannot be fully automated without Playwright (deferred per ADR-034)
Build test creates dist/ as side effect which could affect test isolation — mitigated by dist/ being in .gitignore and builds being idempotent
New test in tests/us-035/ could be accidentally excluded by test script patterns — verified safe: exclusion patterns only match us-001 and us-002
